notes: Real IDSP outbreak reported in tribal hamlets of Visakhapatnam district. Contaminated drinking water source identified as root cause.
Real vector-borne Dengue surge documented by West Bengal Health Department in urban Kolkata wards. Mega sanitation and anti-larvae drives deployed.
Real seasonal Influenza H1N1 spike reported across Delhi NCR during winter season. Advisory on masks and vaccination issued.
Real typhoid cluster reported in South Bengaluru areas. Traced to local food stalls and compromised water pipeline.
Real post-monsoon malaria cases registered by AMC. Vector control teams distributed medicated mosquito nets.
Assam state-wide Japanese Encephalitis alert. Vaccination drives and fogging implemented in high-risk zones.
Real Nipah containment zone set up in Kozhikode district. Strict quarantine and contact-tracing successfully halted further transmission.
Outbreak of Scrub Typhus reported in rural Shimla district. Spread via mites. Insecticide spraying and awareness campaigns run.
Sudden outbreak of ADD in suburban areas of Pune. Attributed to municipal water supply contamination. Mobile medical units deployed.
Chikungunya spike reported in Chennai city limits. Multi-sector mosquito breeding check performed by municipal corporation.
Hepatitis A cases clustered around school food vendors. Vaccination drive and hygiene inspection conducted in the zone.
Post-flood leptospirosis cluster in Mumbai low-lying areas. Prophylactic doxycycline distributed to vulnerable residents.
Measles outbreak among unvaccinated children in urban slums. Intensive immunization drive (MR vaccine) rolled out in response.
Zika virus cases identified. Pregnant women advised to avoid travel to affected areas. Intense vector monitoring active.
Brucellosis cases tracked to raw milk consumption from dairy farm. Control measures placed on cattle transport and milk pasteurization.
